title: Software Update - DFU - Charge Case at low battery - Software update tab in device settings
scenario: DFU blocked with low battery popup when charge case battery is below 5% and not plugged into power
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Scroll to and tap 'Firmware Update' or 'DFU' option
Observe the app response when attempting to start the update
Ensure the charge case battery is below 5% (not plugged in)
Attempt to start the firmware update
Plug the charge case into power
While the update is in progress, unplug the charge case from power (battery still below 5%)
Observe the app behavior after unplugging
expected: When the charge case battery is below 5% and not plugged in, the app shows a popup: 'Update currently not available, please try back later'. The update proceeds only after the charge case is plugged into power. If the device is unplugged during the update while battery is still below 5%, the popup reappears and blocks the update.
